name: Lane A Capability Demo
source: Lane A capability demo (onboarding-consolidation plan): STEP-0 schema + A1 narration driver on /flow-preview/lane-a-demo. QA preview only; droppable once Lane B content lands. Clips reference existing public/voice assets until /voice/ob lands.

beats.name: State check (narration demo)
beats.context: Narration demo: two framing bubbles, then the four check-in rows bloom one at a time as each question is asked.

narration.say: Here's the idea. The first habit isn't a workout or a diet. It's just checking in with yourself. It takes a minute, and it changes everything else. Let's start yours right now.
Let's do your first check-in right now. How are you landing in this moment? Mood, energy, sleep, anything on you.

beats.name: Create your own goal (custom-entry demo)
beats.context: Custom-entry demo: a titled input plus an add button, kind goal.

props.coachLine: Tell me the goal you want to add, and I'll set it up.
props.title: Your goal

beats.name: Weekly projection (narration demo)
beats.context: Weekly projection demo: the most-likely frame with a clip-backed narration bubble, then the grid reveals.

narration.say: Most likely your week looks somewhere around here. Mostly green, a few misses. Still a real win.
